entities.name: Pneumatomachi
entities.description: A group of heretics (also referred to as Theoniacht) who deny the divinity of the Holy Spirit.

attributes.accusation: denying the divinity of the Holy Spirit

entities.name: Holy Spirit
entities.description: The third person of the Trinity, described as the spirit of sanctification and the animating force.

attributes.function: sanctification, provoking prayer, presence in believers

entities.name: God the Father
entities.description: The first person of the Trinity.

attributes.function: creator, sender of the Son and Spirit

entities.name: God the Son (Jesus Christ)
entities.description: The second person of the Trinity.

entities.name: Immanuel
entities.description: A holy name used in consecration rituals.

entities.name: Magical Circle (Imaginary)
entities.description: A circle created through incantations and consecrations when a physical boundary cannot be delineated.

attributes.clothing: black garment to knee, white linen robe to ankles
attributes.equipment: consecrated russet leather shoes with cross, hazel wand

entities.name: Subterranean Spirits
entities.description: Spirits residing in pits and caves.

entities.name: Aerial Spirits
entities.description: Spirits residing on the tops of turrets.

entities.name: Water Spirits
entities.description: Spirits residing in ships and rocks of the sea.

entities.name: Faries, Nymphs, and Satyres
entities.description: Spirits residing in woods and mountains.

entities.name: Hermes Trismegistus
entities.description: Ancient figure cited regarding the necessity of the spirit for all things.

entities.name: Cyril
entities.description: Church father cited in defense of the Trinity.

summary: The passage contains a theological defense of the Holy Spirit's divinity against the Pneumatomachi heretics, alongside an appendix detailing the construction and consecration of magical circles for conjuration. It describes specific ritual attire, tools like hazel wands, and the environmental conditions suitable for summoning various classes of spirits.
